items.name: Arley L.
items.quote: Impeccable service. Very professional and thorough, and everything was completed exactly how I wanted. Both TVs came out great, and everything was cleaned up afterward.

items.name: Laissa M.
items.quote: Josh did an amazing job in my apartment. He installed a 65-inch TV and a 40-inch TV, and I was extremely happy with the result. He was reliable and cleaned up after the job was done.

items.name: Kevin A.
items.quote: Josh did an outstanding job installing my TVs in my new apartment. Everything was mounted, leveled, and connected perfectly, and the setup looked clean and seamless. He was professional, efficient, and clearly takes pride in his work.

items.name: Ari D.
items.quote: Josh did an amazing job mounting my TV and hiding all the wires. He was on time, professional, and the final setup looked perfect.

items.name: Steven O.
items.quote: Fantastic service from Josh. He mounted my 75-inch TV with great precision, secured everything safely, and made sure all the cables were neat and hidden. Excellent craftsmanship and customer service.

items.name: Walter B.
items.quote: AJ Solutions mounted my TV and installed my surround sound system perfectly. They were professional, on time, handled all the wiring cleanly, and made the final setup look sleek. I highly recommend them for TV mounting and home theater setup.

items.name: Laksmy C.
items.quote: Josh was professional and responsive throughout the project. We needed three TVs mounted, a home system installed, and a few other items completed, and everything came out exactly how we wanted.

items.name: Karina G.
items.quote: I have used AJ Solutions for multiple installations across three different homes. Josh always does an amazing job, cleans up afterward, and delivers quality work on TVs, lighting, sound, and more.
